title: cleistes risaraldensis
intro: Cleistes risaraldensis is a species of orchid native to Colombia. It is often referred to as a terrestrial orchid, characterized by its unique flower shape and greenish-yellow color. Research has shown that Cleistes risaraldensis possesses medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which may contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Cleistes risaraldensis may include infusions or decoctions of the plant, although further studies are necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
